tasks.label: Run Sketch (your working file)
tasks.command: javac -cp lib/core.jar -d bin src/Sketch.java && java -cp bin:lib/core.jar Sketch

windows.command: javac -cp lib\core.jar -d bin src\Sketch.java && java -cp bin;lib\core.jar Sketch

tasks.label: Step 1: One Method Per Flag
tasks.command: javac -cp lib/core.jar -d bin src/Step1_OneFlagPerMethod.java && java -cp bin:lib/core.jar Step1_OneFlagPerMethod

windows.command: javac -cp lib\core.jar -d bin src\Step1_OneFlagPerMethod.java && java -cp bin;lib\core.jar Step1_OneFlagPerMethod

tasks.label: Step 2: Reusable Methods
tasks.command: javac -cp lib/core.jar -d bin src/Step2_ReusableMethods.java && java -cp bin:lib/core.jar Step2_ReusableMethods

windows.command: javac -cp lib\core.jar -d bin src\Step2_ReusableMethods.java && java -cp bin;lib\core.jar Step2_ReusableMethods

tasks.label: Step 3: Better Maple Leaf
tasks.command: javac -cp lib/core.jar -d bin src/Step3_BetterMapleLeaf.java && java -cp bin:lib/core.jar Step3_BetterMapleLeaf

windows.command: javac -cp lib\core.jar -d bin src\Step3_BetterMapleLeaf.java && java -cp bin;lib\core.jar Step3_BetterMapleLeaf
